summary: EPIC4 Incentive Engine v2 testing completed. Backend API tests: 93.2% pass rate (55/59). All EPIC4-specific tests PASSED. Frontend UI tests: ALL PASSED. Commission endpoint returns correct per-SKU breakdown with on-collection logic. Strategy toggle works correctly. Rate matrix CRUD fully functional with proper RBAC. Sales home shows commission breakdown with Komisi MTD and Tertagih both > 0 (bug fixed). Regression tests confirm existing features (EPIC3 Costing, AR Receipts, EPIC2 Categories) still work.

design_issues.issue: Strategy text 'Per-SKU v2' and 'Proyeksi saat lunas' not detected in breakdown section (may be in different location)

passed_tests: Backend: Admin/Manager/Sales/Warehouse login (4/4)
Backend: GET /api/sales/commission?period=2026-06 returns strategy=per_sku, breakdown array, total_incentive, projection_full, kpi.total_collected
Backend: Strategy toggle - PUT /api/settings switches between per_sku and achievement_tiered
Backend: Strategy toggle - SALES cannot change strategy (403)
Backend: GET /api/incentive-rates returns 7 rates with all required fields
Backend: MANAGER can POST/PATCH/DELETE incentive rates
Backend: SALES cannot access incentive-rates (403)
Backend: Duplicate rate detection (409)
Frontend: Admin login and navigation to Rate Insentif tab
Frontend: Rate Editor UI - all form fields present (category, per-unit, mechanic, margin-cap, save button)
Frontend: Rate Editor UI - rate table shows 7 rows with edit/delete buttons
Frontend: Strategy dropdown - can switch between Per-SKU v2 and Achievement Tiered
Frontend: Strategy toggle shows notice when changed
Frontend: Sales login and Sales Home page loads
Frontend: Sales Home - Komisi MTD = Rp 180,000 (> 0)
Frontend: Sales Home - Tertagih = Rp 9,775,000 (> 0)
Frontend: Sales Home - Commission breakdown table with 4 categories
Frontend: Sales Home - Total commission = Rp 180,000
Regression: EPIC3 Costing view (Margin & HPP) loads correctly
Regression: EPIC3 AR Receipt (Penagihan tab) loads correctly
Regression: No console errors detected

success_percentage.backend: 93.2% (55/59 tests passed, 4 failures unrelated to EPIC4)
